summary: Premium planners are expensive, cloud-first, and often make AI the product instead of improving native daily workflows.
The opportunity scan compares established demand across productivity, health, education, utility, and lifestyle categories.
Motion and adjacent planners commonly charge roughly $17-$29 per month.
Selected a local-first AI day planner and task decomposer as the first reusable product slice.
A user must create and schedule a task within 60 seconds while preserving a no-AI fallback.
Stop or reshape the direction if useful scheduling requires excessive setup, a backend, or unsafe automatic calendar mutation.
Physical iPhone installation awaits a connected device and Apple signing team

data.cost: free Personal Team for development; paid membership only for TestFlight/App Store
data.fallback: Continue Simulator development and GitHub prereleases
